# PRD — TransHere

**Phase:** retroactive | **Status:** locked (v1.0 deployed) | **Generated by:** Golden stack migration from legacy docs

---

## 1. VISION (The Why)

### Problem Statement

Trans content creators on platforms like OnlyFans and Fansly rely heavily on X (Twitter) parody/promo accounts to drive subscriber traffic. The current workflow forces potential subscribers through a friction-heavy chain: X bio link → generic Linktree/Beacons → individual platform page. Each hop loses ~40-60% of traffic. Existing niche directories use "Web 1.0" classified-ad aesthetics that undermine the premium positioning these creators need, and mainstream link-in-bio tools don't support the conversion patterns (geolocation urgency, visual memory, story-driven engagement) that work for adult content.

### Target Audience

**Primary — Admirers/Visitors:** Cis-gender men, ages 25-55, arriving from X/Twitter links. They value discretion, speed, and visual quality. They will not create accounts or log in. They need to go from link-click to OnlyFans/Fansly subscription in under 3 taps.

**Secondary — Content Creators (Models):** Trans women with active OnlyFans/Fansly pages. They need a professional, premium-feeling landing page that elevates their brand beyond the typical adult directory aesthetic. They do not self-manage their profiles (centrally managed by the platform operator).

**Tertiary — Agency (Self):** The platform operator (Camilo) who manages all model profiles, content uploads, tracking links, and analytics through an admin dashboard.

### Success Signal

A visitor arriving from an X/Twitter tracking link reaches a model's OnlyFans/Fansly page in under 3 seconds with zero login walls, zero pop-ups, and zero friction. The admin can trace every click from source → model → conversion with full attribution.

---

## 2. DELIVERY (The What)

### Mandatory Features (v1) — ALL COMPLETE

| #   | Feature                    | Description                                                                                                                                           | Status   |
| --- | -------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------- |
| F1  | Model Directory Feed       | Mobile-first responsive grid of model cards with category filtering, online status simulation, and geolocation header ("Models Near [City]")          | Complete |
| F2  | Model Profile View         | Split-layout profile with bio, gallery (image + video), Instagram-style stories with 7-day decay, and conversion CTAs                                 | Complete |
| F3  | Instagram-Style Stories    | Story groups (pinned + recent), auto-advance, inter-model swipe, visual memory (seen/unseen rings), chain navigation, deep linking via URL params     | Complete |
| F4  | Zero-Friction Conversion   | Direct `<a>` tags to OnlyFans/Fansly (Safari ITP-safe), ghost link URL obfuscation, bridge page with bot detection, "Copy & Go" pattern               | Complete |
| F5  | Tracking & Attribution     | Traffic sources, subtags, tracking links per model, per-link analytics, materialized view aggregation for 100k+ events                                | Complete |
| F6  | Admin Dashboard            | Model management, gallery/story uploads, tracking link CRUD, analytics dashboard with filters (period, country, source, model), dual light/dark theme | Complete |
| F7  | Organization Multi-Tenancy | API key auth, org-scoped dashboards, model assignment, isolated analytics                                                                             | Complete |
| F8  | Bot Detection & Compliance | Crawler detection (50+ patterns), Reddit OG tags, ghost links for link scraping protection, bridge page content filter safety                         | Complete |
| F9  | Performance Optimization   | Cloudflare Image Resizing, progressive rendering (6 initial cards), custom image loader, Lighthouse Home 94, Profile 89                               | Complete |
| F10 | Visual Memory System       | localStorage-based viewed profiles (grayscale→color) and viewed stories (ring color), cross-tab sync                                                  | Complete |
| F11 | Internationalization       | Geolocation-based language detection (EN/ES), lightweight i18n dictionary, bio_es support                                                             | Complete |

### Explicitly Out of Scope (v1)

- [ ] User authentication / login for visitors — violates "No-Login Philosophy"
- [ ] Comments, likes, or social features — reduces moderation overhead
- [ ] Self-service model uploads — all content centrally managed
- [ ] Mobile native app — web-only for zero install friction
- [ ] Fan subscription / paywall — deferred to v2 (potential revenue model)
- [ ] External org onboarding — org system built but only used internally for now
- [ ] Automated content pipeline — currently manual upload workflow

### Hard Constraints

- **Budget:** Zero-cost stack. Free tiers only (Supabase, Cloudflare Pages, Cloudflare R2). No paid services in v1.
- **Hardware:** MacBook Air M4 16GB (primary), Mac Mini M4 (build server). 256GB storage on both — dependency discipline is critical.
- **Technical:** TypeScript strict mode. Edge Runtime required for all API routes (Cloudflare Pages). No Node.js-specific APIs in route handlers.
- **UX:** Mobile-first (375px primary target). No login walls. Sub-3-second time-to-conversion. Dark mode default (forced).
- **Privacy:** No visitor data collection beyond anonymous analytics events. All tracking is aggregate, not individual.
- **Compliance:** Reddit-safe OG tags (no "age-restricted" wording). Bot detection excludes crawlers from analytics.

### Integration Points

| #   | System                    | Direction  | Purpose                                                                  | Auth Method                                              |
| --- | ------------------------- | ---------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------- |
| I1  | Supabase PostgreSQL       | Read/Write | Model profiles, analytics events, tracking links, organizations, stories | Anon key (public read) + Service role key (admin writes) |
| I2  | Cloudflare R2             | Read/Write | Media storage (profile images, gallery, stories)                         | AWS SDK v3 (S3-compatible) with access key               |
| I3  | Cloudflare Pages          | Deploy     | Edge hosting with global CDN                                             | Wrangler CLI                                             |
| I4  | Cloudflare Image Resizing | Read       | On-the-fly image optimization                                            | `/cdn-cgi/image/` URL convention                         |
| I5  | OnlyFans / Fansly         | Redirect   | Conversion destination (external)                                        | None (outbound links only)                               |

---

## 3. EVIDENCE (The Verification)

### Primary Proof

- Lighthouse Performance scores: Home page 94, Model profile 89
- Admin dashboard displays views AND clicks with full source attribution
- Tracking link click → model page → OnlyFans redirect completes in < 3 seconds
- All 31 database migrations applied without errors
- 400k+ analytics events processed through materialized views

### Safety Gates

- [x] **Security:** Ghost links prevent URL scraping. RLS on all tables. Service role key server-only. No hardcoded secrets.
- [x] **Performance:** Sub-500ms analytics API. Sub-50ms tracking redirect. Lighthouse 89+ on critical pages.
- [x] **Data integrity:** Materialized view refresh matches raw event count (verified with recursive pagination). Deduplication trigger on rapid clicks (1-second window).

### Acceptance Criteria

- [x] All mandatory features (F1–F11) functional and deployed
- [x] All integration points (I1–I5) connected and verified
- [x] All safety gates pass
- [x] Production deployment on Cloudflare Pages operational
- [ ] Test suite passes with coverage targets met — **INCOMPLETE: tests not yet written**

---

## 4. USER FLOWS

### Flow 1: Visitor Conversion (Primary)

```
Visitor clicks tracking link on X/Twitter
  → /go/[slug] resolves tracking link (cached, <50ms)
  → Attribution logged via after() (non-blocking)
  → Redirect to /model/[slug] (model profile page)
  → Visitor browses gallery, stories, profile info
  → Visitor clicks "Chat with Me" CTA (<a> tag, Safari-safe)
  → Ghost link decoded client-side → OnlyFans/Fansly opens in new tab
  → Conversion event logged
```

### Flow 2: Story Engagement

```
Visitor arrives on home page (/)
  → HomeStoriesBar shows models with unseen stories (sorted first)
  → Visitor taps story circle → StoryViewer opens (portal, background blurs)
  → Auto-advance through stories, mark each as viewed
  → "Respond to Story" → Copy & Go pattern (clipboard + new tab)
  → Story deep link ready to paste in model's DMs
```

### Flow 3: Admin Content Management

```
Admin navigates to /admin?key=ADMIN_KEY
  → Dashboard loads with analytics overview
  → Admin selects model from sidebar
  → Uploads gallery items (image/video) via Gallery Manager
  → Creates tracking links per platform (Instagram, X, Reddit)
  → Reviews per-link analytics (clicks, views, CTR)
```

### Flow 4: Admin Analytics Review

```
Admin opens /admin?key=ADMIN_KEY
  → Analytics tab shows aggregate stats (views, clicks, CTR)
  → Applies filters: period, country, source, model
  → Sidebar shows all-model metrics (unfiltered reference)
  → Main dashboard shows filtered data
  → Expands tracking link → sees per-link daily chart
```

---

## 5. KNOWN ISSUES (Active)

| #   | Issue                                                                                                                       | Impact                                              | Priority |
| --- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------- | -------- |
| B1  | Admin dashboard uploads only work from localhost — R2 upload fails in production (Edge runtime lacks DOMParser for AWS SDK) | Cannot update content without local dev environment | HIGH     |
| B2  | Admin dashboard shows views but not clicks to OnlyFans/Fansly                                                               | Cannot measure actual conversion performance        | HIGH     |
| B3  | Visual/layout bugs in frontend                                                                                              | UX degradation on some views                        | MEDIUM   |
| B4  | Content conversion workflow is too manual                                                                                   | Slow content pipeline limits scaling                | MEDIUM   |

- [ ] Organization onboarding — self-service org creation for external agencies
- [ ] Automated content pipeline — reduce manual upload friction
- [ ] pnpm migration — evaluate when/if monorepo structure is needed
- [ ] Comprehensive test suite — unit + integration coverage on critical paths
